title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Yamato as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WORORORO!! It's not like I'll settle for anywhere else, YAMATO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been staying here because Wano is special!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have no chance against me!! Just accept your fate and become this country's shogun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way! I already know I'm not gonna beat you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy is the one Kozuki often was waiting for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm just going to hold you off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't expect me to go easy on you, YAMATo!!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 9 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
